sourceText: Today is a beautiful day. 我们一起去公园散步吧。Machine learning and deep learning are subfields of artificial intelligence. 这项技术正在深刻改变我们的日常生活。The future of technology is exciting. 让我们拥抱变化，迎接挑战。
